translations.**MyData 平台** [線上取用個人資料、授權資料交換](https://: **MyData Platform** [Online Personal Data Access and Authorized Data Exchange](https://mydata.nat.gov.tw){:target="_blank"}
translations.**PIN 一直錯**：先停手！不要硬試，避免鎖卡；先確認是否為你改過的 PIN: **PIN Always Incorrect**: Stop immediately! Do not keep trying to avoid locking the card; first confirm if this is the PIN you changed.
translations.**iPhone**：先把卡片靠近手機背面上方/鏡頭附近，緩慢移動找感應點\n: **iPhone**: First, place the card near the upper back area of the phone or near the camera, then slowly move it to find the sensing point
translations.**一直跳元件未安裝**：確認瀏覽器/元件版本是否匹配（尤其是 macOS 版本: **Keeps prompting component not installed**: Check if the browser/component versions match (especially after macOS updates)
translations.**你的自然人憑證卡片版本支援 NFC** \n例如你提供的操作經驗：部分服務:
**Your Citizen Digital Certificate Card Version Supports NFC**  
For example, based on your experience: some services restrict NFC sensing to specific card number prefixes (e.g., TP07).
translations.**共同技巧**：卡片平貼、慢慢左右/上下移動，不要急著離開\n: **Common Tips**: Keep the card flat, move it slowly left/right or up/down, don’t rush to remove it.
translations.**各式政府入口網站登入**（依網站公告）\n: **Login to Various Government Portal Websites** (According to website announcements)

translations.**數位簽章**：線上簽署文件（很多流程會把它當成本人簽名/簽章的等價替代）\n: **Digital Signature**: Signing documents online (many processes treat it as an equivalent to a personal signature/stamp)
translations.**服務端（APP/網站）支援用 NFC 讀自然人憑證**\n: **Server-side (APP/Website) Support for Reading Natural Person Certificate via NFC**
translations.**網站讀不到卡**：先換 USB 孔、重插讀卡機、換一條線/換台電腦交叉測\n: **Website can't read the card**: Try changing the USB port, reconnecting the card reader, swapping the cable, or testing on a different computer.
translations.**線上填表的兩個關鍵提醒：**\n\n: **Two Key Reminders for Online Form Filling:**
translations.**線上申請資料通常只保留 7 天**：填完別放著，抓時間去戶政臨櫃\n: **Online application data is usually kept for only 7 days**: After filling it out, don't leave it pending—make sure to visit the household registration office in time.

translations.**自然人憑證（Citizen Digital Certificate）** 是: **Citizen Digital Certificate** is a card with an IC chip (or its "mobile version") that allows two functions online:

translations.- **Online Tax Filing** (Login/Declarati:
- **Online Tax Filing** (Login/Declaration/Inquiry)

- **MyData Platform** [Online Personal Data Access and Authorized Data Exchange](https://mydata.nat.gov.tw){:target="_blank"}

translations.- **Online application data is usually k:
- **Online application data is usually kept for only 7 days**: After filling it out, don't leave it pending—make sure to visit the household registration office in time.

- The "User Code" you fill in the form usually needs to be properly kept by yourself (explained later why).
translations.- **Website can't read the card**: Try c:
- **Website can't read the card**: Try changing the USB port, reconnecting the card reader, swapping the cable, or testing on a different computer.

- **Keeps prompting component not installed**: Check if the browser/component versions match (especially after macOS updates).

- **PIN Always Incorrect**: Stop immediately! Do not keep trying to avoid locking the card; first confirm if this is the PIN you changed.
translations.- **iPhone**: First, place the card near:
- **iPhone**: First, place the card near the upper back area of the phone or near the camera, then slowly move it to find the sensing point.

- **Android**: Usually located at the upper middle or center on the back, depending on the brand.

- **Common Tips**: Keep the card flat, move it slowly left/right or up/down, and don’t rush to remove it.
translations.- A mobile device with internet access a:
- A mobile device with internet access and biometric authentication is required.

- A user can usually bind only one set of credentials per device.

- You may need to periodically update the keys or renew the credentials (for example, renewal is possible 60 days before expiration for 1 year).

- There is a security validity period (e.g., up to 8 years), after which you must apply again in person.
translations.- Computer + Card Reader\n\n- Mobile NFC:
- Computer + Card Reader

- Mobile NFC (provided that the "website/app supports it" + "your card version supports it")
translations.- Computer Card Reader (Most Common)\n\n:
- Computer Card Reader (Most Common)

- Mobile NFC (Requires Server Support)

- Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate (App)
translations.- Depth of Available Information\n\n- Sc:
- Depth of Available Information

- Scope of Application Eligibility

- Is a digital signature required?
translations.- For iPhone, start near the camera and:
- For iPhone, start near the camera and slowly move left and right.

- Place the card flat, do not swipe it quickly.

- The server may sometimes require "Do not move the card until the process is complete" after sensing.
translations.- Forgot PIN\n\n- PIN entered incorrectl:
- Forgot PIN

- PIN entered incorrectly causing card lock

- Don't know what the user code is for
translations.- Mobile devices that support biometric:
- Mobile devices that support biometric authentication

- Usually, "one certificate can only be bound to one device."

- Key updates/renewals are required periodically (according to official regulations).
translations.- Not \"using the phone to scan the phys:
- Not "using the phone to scan the physical card," but **binding the certificate within the mobile app** and completing verification via biometric recognition or the phone's security features.

- Advantages: No need to carry a card reader or insert a card

- Restrictions:

  - Mobile devices that support biometric authentication

  - Usually, "one certificate can only be bound to one device."

  - Key updates/renewals are required periodically (according to official regulations).
translations.- You don’t have a card reader and don’t:
- You don’t have a card reader and don’t want to buy one

- You often need to complete government or financial verifications on your mobile phone

- You want to minimize the hassle of "inserting the card + installing components"
translations.- You will receive a physical card.\n\n-:
- You will receive a physical card.

- Common Usage Methods:

  - Computer + Card Reader

  - Mobile NFC (provided that the "website/app supports it" + "your card version supports it")
translations.- [Step-by-step Guide — LINE Bank Deposi: - [Step-by-step Guide — LINE Bank Deposit Firstrade Fast Transfer, Account Upgrade/Auto Transfer/Handling Fee Subsidy Application Tutorial](/posts/e4d139fe0685/)
translations.1. **Identity Verification**: Proves \"y:
1. **Identity Verification**: Proves "you are who you are" for login, inquiry, or application purposes

2. **Digital Signature**: Signing documents online (widely accepted as equivalent to a personal signature or seal)
translations.1. **Original National ID Card**\n\n2. *:
1. **Original National ID Card**

2. **Processing Fee (Cash)**

3. **Email + Mobile Number** (mainly used for receiving notifications)
translations.1. **Your phone supports NFC**\n\n2. **S:
1. **Your phone supports NFC**

2. **Server-side (APP/Website) Support for Reading Natural Person Certificate via NFC**

3. **Your Citizen Digital Certificate Card Version Supports NFC**  
   For example, based on your experience: some services limit NFC sensing to certain card number prefixes (e.g., TP07).
translations.1. Insert the Citizen Digital Certificat:
1. Insert the Citizen Digital Certificate into the card reader

2. Open the website and select "Natural Person Certificate" to log in/sign

3. Enter the PIN as prompted

4. Remove the card **after completing login/signature**
translations.> Reminder: Some components may require: > Reminder: Some components may require browser permissions or restarting the browser/computer. Following the steps usually resolves the issue.
translations.> This article is compiled from official:
> This article is compiled from official information and practical experience. Content may change with policy or website updates, so please refer to MOICA (Ministry of the Interior Certificate Authority) and official service websites for the latest announcements.  
> Further reading (bank case study): [LINE Bank Deposit to Firstrade, Account Upgrade, and Designated Account Tutorial](/posts/e4d139fe0685/)
translations.MOICA 表單上常見說明：PIN 碼可能有預設規則（例如身分證後 4 碼＋出生:
Common explanation on MOICA forms: The PIN may have a default rule (e.g., the last 4 digits of the ID number + birth month and day MMDD), and it is recommended that you change the password on the dedicated website after completion.  
This also means: **The default PIN can be guessed, so be sure to change it.**
translations.PIN 輸錯導致鎖卡\n: PIN entered incorrectly causing card lock
translations.[你可以從 MOICA 找到「跨平台網頁元件下載」入口：](https://mo: [You can find the "Cross-Platform Web Component Download" entry on MOICA:](https://moica.nat.gov.tw/rac_plugin.html){:target="_blank"}
translations.[手把手教學 — LINE Bank 入金 Firstrade 快速到帳、帳戶升: [Step-by-step Guide — LINE Bank Deposit Firstrade Fast Transfer, Account Upgrade/Auto Transfer/Handling Fee Subsidy Application Tutorial](/posts/e4d139fe0685/)
translations.iPhone 請從鏡頭附近開始嘗試，慢慢左右移動\n: For iPhone, start near the camera and slowly move left and right.
translations.一個使用者一台裝置通常只能綁定一組憑證\n: A user can usually bind only one set of credentials per device.
translations.一句話：**線上只是「先填資料」，最後都要到戶政事務所臨櫃。**\n\n: One sentence: **Online is only for "filling in information first," the final step always requires visiting the household registration office in person.**
translations.一般來說「支援智慧卡（Smart Card）」的 USB 讀卡機就可以。 \n:
Generally, a USB card reader that supports "Smart Card" will work.  
If you only need it for tax filing or occasional use, a common model is enough; for long-term office use, choose one with better quality and compatibility.
translations.下面用你提供的 LINE Bank 操作截圖做一個「實戰案例」：同一個自然人憑證: Use the LINE Bank operation screenshots you provided to create a "Practical Case": The same natural person certificate is commonly used in financial scenarios to "change high-risk operations to require strong personal authentication."
translations.下面這張圖把「使用方式」與「能做什麼」拆開，你會更容易理解為什麼有時候要讀卡機、: The image below separates "How to Use" and "What It Can Do," making it easier to understand why sometimes a card reader is needed and other times a phone is enough:
translations.不一定。看你使用的服務支援哪種方式：\n\n: Not necessarily. It depends on which method is supported by the service you use:
translations.不同網站會要求不同的元件（例如跨平台網頁元件/驅動/卡片管理工具）。 \n最穩:
Different websites require different components (such as cross-platform web components, drivers, or card management tools).  
The most reliable approach is to **follow the download page of the specific website you want to use and install accordingly**.
translations.不建議，也很危險。自然人憑證具有身分驗證/數位簽章能力，借用等同把你的「網路身分: Not recommended and very dangerous. The Natural Person Certificate has identity verification and digital signature capabilities, so lending it is equivalent to handing over your "online ID card + seal."
translations.不是「用手機感應實體卡」；而是 **把憑證綁定在手機 App** 內，用生物辨識: Not "using the phone to scan the physical card," but **binding the certificate within the mobile app** and completing verification via biometric recognition or the phone's security features.
translations.不知道用戶代碼是幹嘛的\n: Don't know what the user code is for
translations.不要拿到卡就急著登入網站，先把下一章看完（PIN / 用戶代碼 / 安全）。\n: Don’t rush to log into websites right after getting the card; first, finish reading the next chapter (PIN / User Code / Security).
translations.之後再匯款時就能選「以約定帳戶匯款」，流程會更快也更安全：\n\n: Next time you make a transfer, you can choose "Transfer via designated account," making the process faster and more secure:
translations.你只要記住一個公式： \n**自然人憑證 IC 卡 + 讀卡機 + 電腦（上網:
Just remember one formula:  
**Citizen Digital Certificate IC Card + Card Reader + Computer (with internet) + Required components/drivers for the service = Usable**
translations.你可能是為了網路報稅、申請政府文件、查勞健保資料，或像我在整理 LINE Ban:
You might need it for online tax filing, applying for government documents, checking labor and health insurance data, or in situations like I encountered while preparing a LINE Bank tutorial: **to increase transfer limits or set up a designated account, the bank requires online verification using the Natural Person Certificate**.  
Whether you are "hearing about the Natural Person Certificate for the first time" or "already have the card but don't know how to use it," this article breaks down the entire process in detail: **application, essential steps after receiving the card, how to use it on computer/mobile, what the mobile Natural Person Certificate is, its applications, and how to troubleshoot common issues**.
translations.你在原文分享的心得我完全同意：自然人憑證的感應範圍有時候很小，需要「對位置」。\: I completely agree with your original comment: the NFC range for the Citizen Digital Certificate is sometimes very short and requires precise alignment.
translations.你希望把「插卡＋裝元件」的麻煩降到最低\n: You want to minimize the hassle of "inserting the card + installing components."
translations.你常看到的有兩種：\n\n: There are two common types you often see:
translations.你常需要在手機上完成政府/金融驗證\n: You often need to complete government/financial verification on your mobile phone
translations.你會拿到一張實體卡\n: You will receive a physical card.
translations.你會看到一個表單，包含姓名、身分證字號、Email、手機、PIN 碼（卡片密碼）: You will see a form containing fields for Name, ID Number, Email, Mobile Phone, PIN Code (Card Password), and User Code:
translations.你沒有讀卡機、也不想買\n: You don’t have a card reader and don’t want to buy one
translations.依 MOICA 表單常見說明，實體自然人憑證常見效期為 **5 年**（仍請以卡: According to MOICA form FAQs, the physical Citizen Digital Certificate typically has a validity period of **5 years** (please refer to the card surface or official announcements for confirmation).
translations.依 MOICA 表單常見說明，行動自然人憑證通常會有這些特性（以官方公告為準）：: According to MOICA form FAQs, mobile natural person certificates usually have these features (based on official announcements):
translations.依你的經驗，先從「位置/角度/停留時間」調整：\n\n: Based on your experience, start by adjusting the "position/angle/duration":
translations.優點：不用帶讀卡機、不用插卡\n: Advantages: No need to carry a card reader or insert a card
translations.先不要亂試以免鎖卡。依官方規則，多數會有「解鎖/重設」流程（可能透過用戶代碼或臨: Do not try randomly to avoid locking the card. According to official rules, most cases have an "unlock/reset" process (possibly via user code or in-person service). It is recommended to handle it directly through MOICA's official channels.
translations.卡片要平貼，不要快速掃過\n: Place the card flat, do not swipe it quickly.
translations.原則：**先讓憑證失效（停用/廢止），再處理補發**。避免被撿到的人嘗試濫用。\: Principle: **Deactivate or revoke the certificate first, then proceed with reissuance**. This prevents misuse if the certificate is found by someone else.
translations.可以把它想成：**你每次要「使用卡片」時的解鎖密碼**。 \n許多流程會要求輸:
You can think of it as: **the unlock password you enter each time you want to "use the card."**  
Many processes require entering the PIN to complete verification or signing.
translations.可能需要定期更新金鑰/展期（例如到期前 60 天可展期 1 年）\n: You may need to periodically update the keys/renew (for example, renewal is possible 60 days before expiration for 1 year).
translations.如果你是因為「銀行驗證／提升轉帳額度／設定約定帳戶」才開始查自然人憑證，推薦你接: If you started looking into the Natural Person Certificate because of "bank verification/increasing transfer limits/setting up designated accounts," we recommend you continue with this practical operation guide:
translations.如果你滿足以下任一條件，行動自然人憑證可能更適合你：\n\n: If you meet any of the following conditions, the Mobile Natural Person Certificate might be more suitable for you:
translations.如果你的目標是「銀行/APP 的線上驗證」，你很可能遇到 NFC 模式。 \n:
If your goal is "online verification for banks/apps," you will likely encounter NFC mode.  
For example, when I was organizing a tutorial for LINE Bank, I found that "setting up a designated account requires Natural Person Certificate verification."
translations.完成簡訊驗證後，會看到新增成功：\n\n: After completing the SMS verification, you will see the addition successful message:
translations.官方常見提醒是「用戶代碼不會被系統記錄」，因此遺失後能走的路通常更麻煩（可能需要: The official reminder is that "the user code is not recorded by the system," so losing it usually leads to more complicated procedures (possibly requiring an in-person visit). This is why I always emphasize keeping it offline.
translations.小提醒：某些元件會需要瀏覽器權限或重新啟動瀏覽器/電腦，照步驟做通常就能過。\n: Reminder: Some components may require browser permissions or restarting the browser/computer. Following the steps usually resolves the issue.
translations.我建議你直接照著這份 **最保險的清單：**\n\n: I suggest you follow this **most reliable checklist:**
translations.手機 NFC（前提是「網站/APP 支援」＋「你的卡片版本支援」）\n: Mobile NFC (provided that the "website/app supports it" + "your card version supports it")
translations.打開網站，選擇「自然人憑證」登入/簽章\n: Open the website and select "Natural Person Certificate" to log in/sign.
translations.把自然人憑證插入讀卡機\n: Insert the Citizen Digital Certificate into the card reader
translations.會要求定期更新金鑰/展期（依官方規則）\n: Key updates/renewals are required periodically (according to official regulations).
translations.有安全使用期限（例如最長 8 年，滿期需再臨櫃申辦）\n: There is a security validity period (e.g., up to 8 years), after which you must apply again in person.
translations.服務端有時會要求「感應後不要移動直到完成」\n: The server may sometimes require "Do not move the card until the process is complete" after sensing.
translations.本文以官方資訊＋實際操作經驗整理，內容可能隨政策/網站改版變動，請以 MOICA:
This article is compiled from official information and practical experience. Content may change with policy or website updates, so please refer to MOICA (Ministry of the Interior Certificate Authority) and official service websites for the latest announcements.  
Further reading (bank case study): [LINE Bank Deposit to Firstrade, Account Upgrade, and Designated Account Tutorial](/posts/e4d139fe0685/)
translations.用戶代碼通常用來做「解鎖/停用（復用）」等管理操作（依官方規則）。 \n而且官:
User codes are usually used for management operations such as "unlocking/deactivating (reactivating)" according to official rules.  
The official reminder is: **User codes are not registered in the system**, so you must keep them safe yourself.
translations.第一次使用通常會先做「自然人憑證驗證＋視訊驗證」，完成後就能新增約定帳號：\n\: First-time users usually start with "Natural Person Certificate Verification + Video Verification." After completion, you can add a designated account:
translations.自然人憑證在使用時，最常遇到的不是「不會申辦」，而是：\n\n: The most common issue when using the Natural Person Certificate is not "how to apply," but:
translations.自然人憑證的核心價值是「可信任的身分驗證/簽章」，所以應用會非常廣。下面用「類別: The core value of the Natural Person Certificate is "trusted identity verification/signature," so its applications are very broad. Below is a categorized list to help you quickly reference when needed.
translations.表單填的「用戶代碼」通常需要你自己妥善保管（後面會說為什麼）\n: The "User Code" you fill in the form usually needs to be properly kept by yourself (explained later why).
translations.這段很重要，因為你只要少帶一樣，就會白跑一趟。\n\n: This part is very important because if you forget to bring even one item, your trip will be wasted.
translations.這類服務常見會提供多種登入（自然人憑證、健保卡、手機驗證等），你遇到的差別通常在: These services often offer multiple login options (such as Natural Person Certificate, Health Insurance Card, mobile verification, etc.). The differences you usually encounter are:
translations.通常「一張憑證只能綁定一台裝置」\n: Usually, "one certificate can only be bound to one device."
translations.重點是「任一戶所」：通常不必回戶籍地。 \n現場流程大致是：核對身分 → 繳費:
The key point is "any household registration office": usually, you don't need to return to your registered domicile.  
The on-site process is roughly: identity verification → payment → set/confirm password → receive card.
translations.需要可上網且有生物辨識的行動裝置\n: A mobile device with internet access and biometric authentication is required
translations.需要支援生物辨識的行動裝置\n: Mobile devices that support biometric authentication
